results.title: Surat Webinar Explores Middle East Opportunities Through IJEX, Dubai
results.description: GJEPC’s Surat Regional Office organised a webinar titled “Unlock Middle East Opportunities through IJEX” on 5 June 2026, drawing more than 70 participants from the gem and jewellery industry. The session was led by Ashish Sakhardande, Head – IJEX, GJEPC, who shared insights into the UAE and Middle East jewellery market, highlighting emerging business opportunities... The post Surat Webinar Explores Middle East Opportunities Through IJEX, Dubai appeared first on Solitaire magazine is a International jewellery magazine - India’s leading B2B gem and jewellery magazine .
